overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Welcome to the Spectra admin console. Here you can review usage information, manage shared content and users, and adjust system settings.

shared_content.title: Shared Items
shared_content.description: View or manage all shared items stored in this Spectra instance.

user_management.title: User Management
user_management.description: Create, delete, and manage all users.
user_management.edit_unavailable: Editing users is not implemented yet

new_user_dialog.title: Create User
new_user_dialog.description: Enter a username, email, and password to create a new user
new_user_dialog.name: Username
new_user_dialog.descriptor_selection_title: Choose permissions for the new user
new_user_dialog.validation_required: Name, email, and password are required
new_user_dialog.upload_avatar_instruction: Click or drag an image here to upload avatar
new_user_dialog.avatar_invalid_type: Only gif, bmp, jpg, png and webp files are supported

successful_dialog.title: User Created
successful_dialog.description: Save these credentials now. The password is only shown once.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Adjust Spectra settings based on your preferences.

authorization.service_unavailable: Unable to connect to the server

unauthorized.description: You are not logged in to Spectra yet. Please return to the home page and sign in.
unauthorized.title: Not Logged In

permission_denied.description: You do not have permission to manage this Spectra server.
permission_denied.title: Permission Denied
